mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fitness_content (title, content, summary, cover_image, author_id, author_name, status, view_count, like_count, collect_count, share_count, create_time, update_time, publish_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{summary}, #{coverImage}, #{authorId}, #{authorName}, #{status}, 0, 0, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW(), #{publishTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE fitness_content SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, summary = #{summary}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, author_id = #{authorId}, author_name = #{authorName}, status = #{status}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM fitness_content WHERE author_id = #{authorId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM fitness_content WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT fc.* FROM fitness_content fc JOIN content_tag_relation ctr ON fc.id = ctr.content_id WHERE ctr.tag_id = #{tagId} AND fc.status = 1 ORDER BY fc.create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM fitness_content WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY view_count DESC, like_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE fitness_content SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE fitness_content SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE fitness_content SET collect_count = collect_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE fitness_content SET share_count = share_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
